chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.951 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 25.08.2025 None present for the applicant. None present for the complainant. Mr. Zahoor Shah, APG Sindh. SIP Zulfiquar of PS Gizri. ------------------------------- No one is present on behalf of the applicant. Same was the position on last two dates of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
